scripts.test: npx tsc --outDir .tmp-tests --module commonjs --target es2020 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --resolveJsonModule lib/types.ts lib/mood.ts lib/dashboard.ts lib/summary.ts lib/summary.test.ts lib/chart.ts lib/chart.test.ts lib/validation.ts lib/validation.test.ts lib/layout-safety.test.ts lib/dashboard-kpi.test.ts lib/safety/crisisLexicon.ts lib/safety/detector.ts lib/safety/detector.test.ts lib/safety/review-guard.test.ts && node --test .tmp-tests/summary.test.js .tmp-tests/chart.test.js .tmp-tests/validation.test.js .tmp-tests/layout-safety.test.js .tmp-tests/dashboard-kpi.test.js .tmp-tests/safety/detector.test.js .tmp-tests/safety/review-guard.test.js && powershell -NoProfile -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .tmp-tests -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
scripts.test:visual: npx playwright install chromium && node tests/visual/dashboard-smoke.mjs
